description: Doubles: TWO Pokemon active per side (four on the field). A team preview precedes each match; each player brings 4 of 6. A match ends when all of one side's brought 4 have fainted.

rules.format_notes: This is DOUBLES: 2 Pokemon active per side, team of 6, bring 4 of 6 (read directly off the selection screen, don't guess). Species Clause is in effect - Mega Evolution is a transformation of an existing team member, not a second Pokemon; never count 'X' and 'X (Mega)' as two different picks. Coaching must respect: 2 active per side, bring 4 of 6, win by KOing all of the opponent's brought Pokemon. Regulation-specific facts (which species/mechanics are actually legal right now - Mega/Dynamax/Terastallization, the exact roster) come from a SEPARATE regulation layer (adapters/pokemon/regulations/<id>.json, merged in by compose_schema.py's --regulation flag), not from this mode file - this file only covers what's true of doubles as a MODE, regardless of which regulation is active. See ARCHITECTURE_HANDOFF.md section 3a.

fields.player_active: field_state: the player's TWO active Pokemon, comma-separated, if visible
fields.opponent_active: field_state: the opponent's TWO active Pokemon, comma-separated, if visible

notes: This is DOUBLES: TWO Pokemon active per side, FOUR on the field. A 'field_state' must list both of the player's active Pokemon (player_active) and both of the opponent's (opponent_active), with their HP in detail. TEAM PREVIEW: before each match a screen shows BOTH players' 6 Pokemon and each picks 4 - emit ONE 'team_preview' listing the 6 per side (and the 4 brought if shown); team preview marks a NEW MATCH starting. A match ends only when ALL of one side's brought (up to 4) Pokemon have fainted, shown by a 'You won!'/defeat/results screen - emit ONE 'battle_end' per match with winner 'player' or 'opponent' (expect up to ~4 faints per side per match). This game has a small CLOSED roster (not the full Pokedex, exact roster and legal mechanics depend on which regulation is active - see the separate regulation layer). Species Clause: Mega Evolution is the SAME team member transforming, never a second Pokemon.

example_output.detail: P1 team: Incineroar, Sylveon, Blaziken, Torterra, Corviknight, Garchomp | P2 team: Metagross, Whimsicott, Farigiraf, Talonflame, Kingambit, Grimmsnarl
